notes_for_human_reviewer: DIMENSIONAL INDEPENDENCE AT THE TOP END. Every item has scenario-specific detail, named primary + backup owners, dated follow-ups, dollar-amount-and-date mitigations with backup plans, escalation paths pre-cleared, and cross-references between R/I/D. Content quality is identical to hire_ready_01. The single difference: the artifact explicitly says 'first iteration; no prior versions yet' and shows no version markers, change log, or status transitions. Tests whether the grader can hold living_artifact_evidence at the floor while NOT halo-averaging the other four dims down (common drift: scoring everything 4 because one dim is weak). expected_pass=false because any dim < 3 → fail; expected_hire_ready=true because overall=4.2 and the qualitative profile is a strong PC who simply hasn't had a chance to iterate yet.
